sourcesContent:
export const sites = [
  { id:1, name:'Meenakshi Amman Temple', city:'Madurai', type:'Heritage', emoji:'🛕', dist:'450 km', rating:4.9, desc:'Ancient Dravidian temple, one of TN\'s most iconic landmarks', ar:true, tags:['Temple','Architecture','History'] },
  { id:2, name:'Brihadeeswarar Temple', city:'Thanjavur', type:'UNESCO', emoji:'🏛️', dist:'320 km', rating:4.9, desc:'UNESCO World Heritage Site, 1000-year-old Chola masterpiece', ar:true, tags:['UNESCO','Temple','Chola'] },
  { id:3, name:'Mahabalipuram', city:'Chennai', type:'Heritage', emoji:'🗿', dist:'60 km', rating:4.7, desc:'Shore temple and rock-cut caves, UNESCO World Heritage', ar:true, tags:['UNESCO','Beach','History'] },
  { id:4, name:'Ooty (Udhagamandalam)', city:'Nilgiris', type:'Nature', emoji:'🌿', dist:'540 km', rating:4.8, desc:'Queen of Hill Stations — tea gardens, botanical gardens, toy train', ar:false, tags:['Hills','Nature','Scenic'] },
  { id:5, name:'Kodaikanal', city:'Dindigul', type:'Nature', emoji:'⛰️', dist:'460 km', rating:4.7, desc:'Princess of Hill Stations, stunning lake and Silver Cascade falls', ar:false, tags:['Hills','Lake','Trekking'] },
  { id:6, name:'Rameswaram', city:'Ramanathapuram', type:'Pilgrimage', emoji:'🌊', dist:'580 km', rating:4.8, desc:'Sacred island temple, Agni Theertham beach, Pamban Bridge', ar:true, tags:['Temple','Beach','Pilgrimage'] },
  { id:7, name:'Kanyakumari', city:'Kanyakumari', type:'Pilgrimage', emoji:'🌅', dist:'700 km', rating:4.8, desc:'Southernmost tip of India, three seas meet, breathtaking sunrise', ar:false, tags:['Sunrise','Beach','Pilgrimage'] },
  { id:8, name:'Mudumalai Wildlife Sanctuary', city:'Nilgiris', type:'Wildlife', emoji:'🐘', dist:'550 km', rating:4.6, desc:'Home to elephants, tigers, leopards — part of Nilgiri Biosphere', ar:false, tags:['Wildlife','Safari','Nature'] },
];

export const itineraries = [
  { id:1, title:'Cultural Triangle', days:3, places:['Madurai','Thanjavur','Mahabalipuram'], emoji:'🛕', desc:'Heritage temples and ancient history' },
  { id:2, title:'Hill Station Escape', days:4, places:['Ooty','Kodaikanal','Valparai'], emoji:'🌿', desc:'Cool breeze and scenic landscapes' },
  { id:3, title:'Coastal Pilgrimage', days:3, places:['Rameswaram','Kanyakumari','Tiruchendur'], emoji:'🌊', desc:'Sacred shores and spiritual journey' },
  { id:4, title:'Wildlife Adventure', days:3, places:['Mudumalai','Anamalai','Kalakkad'], emoji:'🐘', desc:'Safari and nature exploration' },
];

export const markets = [
  { name:'Kanchipuram Silk Sarees', type:'Textile', emoji:'🥻', price:'₹2,000 - ₹50,000', origin:'Kanchipuram', rating:4.9 },
  { name:'Thanjavur Tanjore Painting', type:'Art', emoji:'🎨', price:'₹1,500 - ₹20,000', origin:'Thanjavur', rating:4.8 },
  { name:'Kondapalli Toys', type:'Crafts', emoji:'🪆', price:'₹200 - ₹2,000', origin:'Various', rating:4.7 },
  { name:'Filter Coffee Powder', type:'Food', emoji:'☕', price:'₹150 - ₹500', origin:'Coorg/Nilgiris', rating:4.9 },
  { name:'Madurai Jasmine Garland', type:'Flowers', emoji:'🌸', price:'₹50 - ₹200', origin:'Madurai', rating:4.8 },
  { name:'Bronze Nataraja Idol', type:'Sculpture', emoji:'🗿', price:'₹500 - ₹10,000', origin:'Swamimalai', rating:4.9 },
];

export const emergencyContacts = [
  { name:'Tourist Helpline', number:'1800-425-4747', emoji:'📞', available:'24/7' },
  { name:'Police', number:'100', emoji:'👮', available:'24/7' },
  { name:'Ambulance', number:'108', emoji:'🚑', available:'24/7' },
  { name:'Fire', number:'101', emoji:'🚒', available:'24/7' },
  { name:'TN Tourism Dept', number:'044-25383333', emoji:'🏛️', available:'9AM-6PM' },
  { name:'Women Helpline', number:'181', emoji:'👩', available:'24/7' },
];
